svg.title: SGC Navigator – Architecture diagram (GraphQL)
svg.desc: System architecture showing browser client, React/TypeScript frontend, Spring Boot GraphQL backend, and Neo4j graph database with ~700k SKOS terms.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does the browser client do in SGC Navigator?')
sendPrompt('How does the search component query GraphQL?')
sendPrompt('How does the graph view use GraphQL for traversal?')
sendPrompt('What fields does the term detail component request via GraphQL?')
sendPrompt('How does the GraphQL schema define the SKOS concept type?')
sendPrompt('How do resolvers traverse the Neo4j graph?')
sendPrompt('How does Spring Data Neo4j back the GraphQL resolvers?')
sendPrompt('How is the SKOS data modelled in Neo4j for SGC Navigator?')
